work-kinectrics.title: AI / Software Developer Intern at Kinectrics
work-kinectrics.content:
## Responsibilities

- Designed and implemented anomaly detection systems using LSTM and Transformer-based (TranAD) architectures on industrial time-series data.
- Built end-to-end machine learning pipelines, including data preprocessing, model training, and evaluation using Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch.
- Developed an interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time anomaly monitoring and system insights.
- Collaborated with engineering teams to integrate AI models into practical operational workflows.

## Impact

- Achieved high anomaly detection performance (F1-score ~0.95) while maintaining zero false-negative critical events.
- Reduced false positives through advanced threshold tuning and model optimization.
- Enabled real-time monitoring capabilities for engineers, improving system visibility and response time.
- Contributed to deploying production-ready AI solutions within industrial environments.

work-infolib.title: IT / Software Intern at Infolib
work-infolib.content:
## Responsibilities

- Worked with ERP and CRM systems to support business operations and client requests.
- Collaborated with stakeholders to gather requirements and improve system workflows.
- Provided technical support and contributed to task coordination within the intern team.

## Impact

- Improved system usability by optimizing internal workflows and data handling.
- Reduced recurring technical issues through effective troubleshooting.
- Enhanced operational efficiency by supporting reliable system performance.
- Contributed to smoother coordination between technical and business teams.

work-nodo.title: IT Technician at ABS Confection
work-nodo.content:
## Responsibilities

- Provided technical support for internal systems and business applications.
- Maintained and updated a staff scheduling system to ensure accurate shift tracking.
- Managed inventory tracking tools and ensured data consistency across records.
- Assisted in optimizing database workflows to improve usability and efficiency.
- Diagnosed and resolved software-related issues to minimize downtime.

## Impact

- Improved operational efficiency by streamlining internal processes.
- Reduced system errors and manual inconsistencies through better data handling.
- Ensured stable day-to-day system performance for business operations.
